column1: # frequently_errors.tsv -- curated catalog of recurring FM / class-method / codegen
# mistakes and their remedies. Read by sap-gen-abap (Step 1.5f) to steer generation
# away from known traps. This file is TIER 3 (lowest precedence) of the loop.
# Precedence at read time (highest wins on conflict; union otherwise; MUTE suppresses):
#   OBJECT_TYPE     FM | METHOD | BAPI | STMT | AUTHZ   (STMT = general rule, OBJECT_NAME=*)
#   OBJECT_NAME     FM name, CLASS name, auth object, or * for a statement-level rule
#   CONTEXT         parameter / method / clause / sub-context (blank if whole object)
#   ERROR_CLASS     short machine code for the trap family
#   RELEASE         SAP_BASIS release the trap applies to (ALL | 7.52 | ...)
#   CORRECT_PATTERN the remedy to emit instead (the load-bearing field)
#   SEVERITY        ACTIVATION | ATC_P1 | ATC_P2 | ATC_P3 | RUNTIME
#   RULE_REF        cross-ref to abap_code_quality_rules.md (e.g. section 24) or other
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are skipped. Cell separator is TAB.

column6: WRONG_PATTERN
column7: CORRECT_PATTERN
column11: NOTE

column6: Blank MATNR relying on internal numbering
column7: Supply explicit MATNR; verify external numbering allowed (T134-NUMKE / NRIV range) before assigning
column11: No internal numbering; HALB external on S4D 1909 (NUMKE=13), FERT/HAWA/ROH internal-only -> M3 Enter material number

column6: IMPORTING return = DATA(ls_ret)
column7: Pre-declare DATA ls_ret TYPE bapiret2 and pass by name
column11: DATA(...) not possible in this position on 7.52, then cascading unknown errors

column6: mrp_view = X with no MARC-DISMM supplied
column7: Default mrp_type (DISMM) to ND when blank, or omit the MRP view
column11: BAPI rejects MARC-DISMM mandatory -> 0 posted

column6: Setting gross_wt/volume/volumeunit on clientdata/clientdatax
column7: Set weight/volume on marmdata/marmdatax (MARM-resident)
column11: AI training data wrongly flattens onto BAPI_MARA; silent data loss

column6: PLANT_VIEW / OLD_MATNR / NET_WEIGHT on BAPI_MARM
column7: Use PURCHASE_VIEW (BAPIMATHEAD), OLD_MAT_NO (BAPI_MARA); NET_WEIGHT on BAPI_MARA
column11: Wrong BAPI struct field names observed run #4

column6: Passing p_file TYPE rlgrap-filename to formal STRING
column7: Adapter: DATA(lv_fn) = CONV string( p_file ); pass lv_fn
column11: Survives syntax+activation; only ATC catches CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE

column6: rlgrap-filename actual into STRING formal
column7: Same CONV string( ) adapter as GUI_UPLOAD
column11: Same FILENAME=STRING trap family

column6: Inline DATA() in CHANGING; table-expr lt_files[ 1 ]-filename
column7: Pre-declare file_table; READ TABLE INTO ls; reference ls-filename
column11: 7.52 strict mode rejects inline DATA() and table expressions in this position

column6: Inline DATA() inside CALL FUNCTION IMPORTING
column7: Pre-declare the receiver, pass by name
column11: Cascading X unknown errors follow on 7.52

column6: IMPORTING it TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF <dbtab> in a method signature
column7: Declare a TYPES alias once and reference it in every signature
column11: Cannot interpret <DBTAB> on 7.52

column6: SELECT INTO TABLE @DATA(lt) then pass lt to a named-type IMPORTING
column7: Declare lt with the named table-type alias before the SELECT
column11: Anonymous table type incompatible with named parameter

column6: PERFORM f USING obj->meth( )
column7: Assign meth( ) to a variable first, then PERFORM USING the variable
column11: No method can be specified in the current position on 7.52

column6: MESSAGE 'literal text' TYPE 'E'
column7: Route via a message class: MESSAGE eNNN(zXXX) WITH ...
column11: Literal strings are not translatable -> ATC P2 every time

column6: ID 'MATART' (invented field)
column7: Use real fields ACTVT and BEGRU (resolve via USOBT_C / TOBJ / SU21)
column11: Invented field passes activation but fails ATC AUT 0302

column6: Invented ID field
column7: Use real fields ACTVT and WERKS
column11: Plant-level material authorization object

column6: Referencing a text-symbol (tNN) absent from the text_elements file
column7: Every (tNN) / symbol referenced must exist in *.text_elements.txt; emit it
column11: Undefined (t02) observed; ATC P3 + activation risk

column6: RFC_READ_TABLE on REPOSRC (any FIELDS projection)
column7: Use PROGDIR/TRDIR/TADIR for metadata; READ REPORT / RPY_PROGRAM_READ for source; SE16N for rows
column11: ASSIGN CASTING dump in SAPLSDTX -- row width exceeds cap; guarded in sap_rfc_lib.ps1

column6: SPLIT lv_line AT sep INTO ... ls_rec-ntgew (QUAN/CURR/DEC/packed DDIC target)
column7: SPLIT into an all-CHARACTER staging struct, then MOVE field-by-field into the typed target (numeric conversion happens on the assignment)
column11: Confirmed live 2026-06-07 MaterialUpload CN *56 (ZMMRMAT056*) on S/4HANA 1909; NTGEW (net weight) is QUAN. SPLIT INTO targets must be C/N/D/T/STRING

column3: report global decls vs event block
column6: Global TYPES / CLASS DEFINITION / DATA emitted AFTER an event block (AT SELECTION-SCREEN / START-OF-SELECTION)
column7: Emit all global TYPES, CLASS lcl_main DEFINITION, DATA and SELECTION-SCREEN BEFORE any event block; CLASS IMPLEMENTATION + ltcl test class last
column11: Live 2026-06-07 MaterialUpload CN *58: ty_row declared after AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST -> scoped inside the event -> Type TY_ROW unknown -> SE38 syntax gate fail

column3: SELECT existence check on buffered table
column6: SELECT SINGLE COUNT(*) / SELECT COUNT(*) as an existence check on a buffered table (T001/T001W/T023/T134 ...)
column7: SELECT SINGLE <keyfield> ... INTO @lv then IF sy-subrc <> 0; the COUNT(*) aggregate bypasses the table buffer (use COUNT(*) only on un-buffered tables like MARA)
column11: Live 2026-06-07 MaterialUpload CN *58: COUNT(*) on buffered T001/T001W -> ATC SELECT bypassing table buffer P2

column3: file key field read via GUI_UPLOAD/READ DATASET (CONVEXIT ALPHA/MATN1)
column6: ls_rec-matnr = lv_ext_matnr. (raw external key used directly in SELECT/BAPI)
column7: After parse, CALL FUNCTION CONVERSION_EXIT_<CONVEXIT>_INPUT (MATN1 for MATNR, ALPHA for KUNNR/LIFNR) EXPORTING input=ext IMPORTING output=internal; use internal for SELECT/BAPI/WHERE. Resolve CONVEXIT from the struct-signatures column.
column11: MATN1 live-confirmed 2026-06-20 MaterialUpload *84 (external FERT MATNR); ALPHA same family. Passes activation+ATC, only wrong at runtime.

column3: file unit/language field via GUI_UPLOAD (CONVEXIT CUNIT/ISOLA - needs LANGUAGE)
column6: ls_rec-meins = 'PC'. (commercial unit stored without CUNIT -> BAPI rejects the unit)
column7: CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_INPUT' EXPORTING input=ext language=sy-langu IMPORTING output=meins EXCEPTIONS unit_not_found=1 others=2; route failure via the message class. ISOLA likewise for SPRAS.
column11: CUNIT PC->ST live-confirmed 2026-06-20 S/4HANA 2022 MaterialUpload *84. CUNIT and ISOLA are language-dependent.

column3: key/unit field written to file via GUI_DOWNLOAD/TRANSFER
column6: TRANSFER ls_rec-matnr TO dataset. (internal padded/shifted value written to file)
column7: Before writing, CALL FUNCTION CONVERSION_EXIT_<CONVEXIT>_OUTPUT (MATN1/ALPHA strip leading zeros; CUNIT/ISOLA with LANGUAGE) so the file carries the external form.
column11: Outbound mirror of CONV_EXIT_INPUT_MISSING; established SAP semantics.

column3: amount file column into a BAPI amount field (BAPICURR/BAPICUREXT/BAPICURR_D)
column6: CURRENCY_AMOUNT_DISPLAY_TO_SAP then pass amount_internal into the BAPI BAPICURR field (shifts twice)
column7: Pass the parsed EXTERNAL amount straight into the BAPICURR/BAPICUREXT field, plus its currency key; the BAPI applies the TCURX shift. Do NOT pre-convert.
column11: Invisible for USD/EUR (2 dec); 100x wrong for JPY (0 dec), 10x for BHD/KWD (3 dec). Established SAP semantics.

column3: amount written to a raw DDIC CURR/QUAN field (custom Z-table / classic FM)
column6: zfix-amt = lv_ext_amount. (external amount stored to a raw CURR field without the currency shift)
column7: CURR inbound: CALL FUNCTION 'CURRENCY_AMOUNT_DISPLAY_TO_SAP' EXPORTING currency=waers amount_display=ext IMPORTING amount_internal=field; outbound _SAP_TO_DISPLAY. QUAN: WRITE qty TO str UNIT meins.
column11: Decimals are currency-dependent (TCURX-CURRDEC) / unit-dependent (T006-DECAN); JPY(0)/BHD(3) reveal the shift.

column3: CURR/QUAN file column mapped without its currency(CUKY)/unit(UNIT) reference
column6: map NETPR/NTGEW alone with no WAERS/MEINS column (amount uninterpretable)
column7: A CURR field needs its CUKY currency and a QUAN its UNIT, both mapped and populated (REFTABLE/REFFIELD from struct-signatures); if the spec omits it, surface it as a spec gap.
column11: e.g. VBAP-NETPR needs VBAP-WAERK; the decimal count comes from the reference currency/unit.
